content: Apologies are in order when Mr. Smith is mistaken for Mr. Jones.（划线词：order）
options: appropriate under the circumstances
the way that things or events are arranged in relation to each other, for example showing whether something is first, second, third, etc.
the food or drink you have asked for in a restaurant or bar

content: Human nature is the basis of character, temperament and disposition.（划线词：disposition）
options: the position or arrangement of something in a particular place
a tendency or willingness to behave in many ways
a particular type of character which makes someone likely to behave or react in a certain way

content: It is only the surface that is capable of alteration, improvement and refinement.（划线词：refinement）
options: something that has been found again
improving something; making something better than it was before
having cultured elegance

content: Man’s majesty and nobility are taken for granted, although his faults and weaknesses are constantly paraded before our eyes.（划线词：paraded）
options: to walk or march together to celebrate or protest about something
to show something publicly
a public celebration when musical bands, brightly decorated vehicles, etc. move down the street

content: But the murderer, robber or wife beater is singled out for publicity, because such conduct is unusual.（划线词：singled）
options: the only one
people who are not married and are not involved in a romantic relationship with anyone
to separate or choose from a group, especially for special treatment or notice

content: Every man unfolds a distinct character over which circumstances and education have only the most limited control.（划线词：distinct）
options: separate, clearly different in quality, belonging to a different and particular type
(something) clearly be seen, heard, smelled, etc.
(a possibility, feeling, quality, etc.) definitely existing and cannot be ignored

content: He was made to advance; the power to do so distinguishes him from the animal.（划线词：distinguishes）
options: to recognize and understand the difference between two or more things or people
to be the thing that makes someone or something different or special
to do something so well that people notice and remember you

content: Each holds to the structure of the mold into which the soul was cast at the time of its individualization.（划线词：cast）
options: all the people who perform in a play, film, etc.
to throw or drop
to shape (metal or other material) by pouring it into a mold while molten

content: One plunges into the surf and rescues a swimmer from drowning; another dashes into a burning house and carries a stranger to safety.（划线词：surf）
options: the mass or line of foam formed by waves breaking on a seashore or reef
to ride on the crest of a wave, typically toward the shore while riding on a surfboard
to move from site to site on the Internet

content: Human nature does not and cannot change but unfolds its inherent pattern on the loom of Eternal Time.（划线词：unfolds）
options: (a story) being told
(a series of events) happens
(something) opens out, develops
